arts.sum: Brighton travel to Manchester City this afternoon hoping to extend their impressive winning run. The Seagulls have won six straight games in all competitions, a club record as a top-flight side. Brighton’s good form has carried Fabian Hurzeler’s side into the race for Champions League qualification and secured progress to the FA Cup quarter-finals.
